prompt_config.theme: Late Cretaceous Period - Premium Time Travel Safari Experience
prompt_config.photography_style: Aspirational travel advertising, adventure tourism, Instagram-optimized

main_prompt: Eye-catching travel agency promotional image for premium Cretaceous safari, 1:1 square format for Instagram, luxury tourism campaign style, excited tourists in modern safari vehicle with transparent dome experiencing thrilling T-Rex encounter safely, or beautiful observation platform with families watching Triceratops herd peacefully, spectacular golden hour lighting creating magical prehistoric atmosphere, lush fern-covered landscape with ancient trees, vibrant appealing colors, sense of wonder and safety combined, luxury adventure tourism aesthetic, scientifically accurate dinosaurs presented as accessible vacation destination, square composition perfect for Instagram with both wildlife spectacle and tourist comfort visible, aspirational lifestyle imagery, 8K detailed, travel marketing making viewers want to book immediately

composition_notes.instagram_optimization: Square 1:1 travel marketing format for maximum Instagram feed impact, showing both incredible dinosaur attraction AND tourist experience
framing_options: Option 1: Safari vehicle with transparent dome in foreground, excited tourists visible inside, T-Rex or Triceratops impressive but safe in frame, balanced composition
Option 2: Observation platform with tourists watching dinosaurs below, beautiful prehistoric vista, showing comfort and spectacle
Option 3: Tourist taking selfie-style photo with dinosaur in background (from safe distance), relatable Instagram moment
Option 4: Family group on platform pointing at Quetzalcoatlus flying overhead, wonder and education combined
composition_notes.square_appeal: Centered dynamic composition that works perfectly in Instagram grid, immediately eye-catching with both adventure and safety appeal

travel_agency_concept.instagram_marketing: Premium time travel safari presented as ultimate bucket-list Instagram-worthy experience, luxury adventure tourism for social media generation
travel_agency_concept.target_audience: Instagram users interested in travel, adventure, unique experiences, families, dinosaur enthusiasts, luxury lifestyle
travel_agency_concept.selling_points: Once-in-a-lifetime photo opportunity, perfectly safe, expert guided, comfortable, educational, shareable experience
travel_agency_concept.attraction_appeal: Show spectacular dinosaur encounters AND quality comfortable tourist facilities, balance thrill with safety

tourist_experience_square.safari_vehicles: Modern sleek observation vehicles with transparent protective domes, tourists visible inside with cameras and excited expressions, high-tech comfortable, professional guides pointing out features
tourist_experience_square.viewing_platforms: Elegant elevated platforms with safety railings, comfortable seating, tourists in modern safari casual wear (khaki, earth tones, sun hats), diverse families and couples enjoying experience
tourist_experience_square.tourist_authenticity: Real people visibly excited and taking photos, genuine wonder on faces, modern comfortable outdoor clothing, showing this is achievable real vacation not fantasy
tourist_experience_square.safety_professional: All elements show secure professional operation - reinforced viewing areas, expert guides in uniform, safety equipment, adventure is thrilling but controlled

dinosaur_stars.tyrannosaurus_rex: T-Rex as iconic star attraction at safe impressive distance, detailed realistic scaly skin, lips covering teeth, brown-grey with display colors, magnificent and powerful but not threatening tourists
dinosaur_stars.triceratops: Triceratops herd as gentle giants, impressive horns and frill, peaceful grazing making them accessible attraction, family groups visible creating appeal
dinosaur_stars.quetzalcoatlus: Giant pterosaurs flying overhead or landing creating aerial spectacle, impressive wingspan, unique photo opportunity
dinosaur_stars.presentation: Dinosaurs shown in natural behavior at perfect viewing distance, creating wow factor while showing tourists are completely safe

prehistoric_paradise.landscape_beauty: Lush beautiful fern-covered plains (no grass), ancient conifers, Cycads, flowering Magnolias, presented as stunning exotic destination not scary wilderness
prehistoric_paradise.welcoming_atmosphere: Warm golden hour light, beautiful colors, clear visibility, comfortable climate, inviting paradise aesthetic

instagram_colors.vibrant_feed_appeal: Rich vibrant but natural colors that pop in Instagram feeds - lush greens, warm golds, beautiful sky tones, impressive dinosaur colors
instagram_colors.balanced_palette: Visually harmonious color scheme that looks professional and appealing, commercial quality color grading

negative_prompt: scary threatening, dangerous atmosphere, tourists in danger, attacking dinosaurs, dark ominous, horror aesthetic, panic fear, damaged vehicles, uncomfortable conditions, budget tourism, circus presentation, anachronistic dinosaurs, cartoon style, unrealistic colors, poor quality, blurry, aggressive marketing, cheesy tourist trap, fake manipulated, horizontal composition, stretched image
